MODULE: cosmos.integration.channels.webchat
FILE: cosmos/integration/channels/webchat.py (448 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos WebChat Channel Adapter
===================================

Built-in web chat interface for the Cosmos swarm.

Features:
- WebSocket real-time communication
- Session management
- File uploads
- Typing indicators
- Message history
- Multiple concurrent users
- Integration with ChannelHub

Th

CLASSES:
- WebChatSession: Represents a web chat session.
- WebChatChannel(BaseChannel): Built-in web chat channel.

Works with FastAPI WebSocket endpoints to provide
re
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: def create_session(self, user_id: str=None, user_name: str=None, metadata: Dict=None) -> WebChatSess
  Methods: def get_session(self, session_id: str) -> Optional[WebChatSession]
  Methods: async def end_session(self, session_id: str)
  Methods: def register_websocket(self, session_id: str, websocket: Any)
  Methods: def unregister_websocket(self, session_id: str)
  Methods: async def receive_message(self, session_id: str, text: str, media_url: str=None, media_type: str=Non
